title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
friendlyTitle: OpenAI made a harder biology benchmark
summary: OpenAI introduced GeneBench-Pro, a benchmark of 129 computational-biology problems designed to test judgment-heavy scientific reasoning under ambiguity. The benchmark uses synthetic data with known causal structure so models can be assessed on realistic analytical decisions rather than simple recall.
friendlySummary: OpenAI released a test for AI systems doing complex biology analysis with messy data.
whyItMatters: Scientific AI needs to handle messy data, assumptions, and defensible judgment calls. Benchmarks like this help separate models that can execute a workflow from systems that can support real research decisions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Better tests can help show when AI is truly useful for science and when it is only following steps.
